Package com.stzteam.features.posefinder

Class PoseFinder

java.lang.Object
com.stzteam.features.posefinder.PoseFinder
public class PoseFinder extends Object
PoseFinder optimizado para CTRE Phoenix 6 Swerve. Requiere que CommandSwerveDrivetrain haya llamado a configurePathPlanner().
